title: Fix P1-5 + re-vendor: transport wording amendments, anchored-marker contract in docs, onboarding re-apply
action: Fix P1-5 and propagate the P1-1 anchored-marker contract into the durable record, then re-vendor: (1) docs/decisions/0015-ceiling-is-the-session-model.md line ~19: amend the omission-only sentence inline to '... omits the Agent model param AND carries the [bee-tier: ceiling] marker (decision 0023)' — this is a WORDING amendment inside the existing decision body; the single Status amendment line from cell 4 stays the only '0023' Status mention, but grep -c 0023 on the whole file will now be >1, that is expected and the old exact-count check does not re-run. (2) skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md lines ~39 and ~50: amend both omission-only descriptions so omission + anchored marker are one inseparable inherit transport ('omit the model param AND lead the prompt (first non-whitespace token) or description with [bee-tier: ceiling]'). (3) skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md step 4: add the position requirement (marker at prompt head or description start). (4) docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md: update the transport clause to the anchored position rule (P1-1) — first non-whitespace token of prompt, or description starts with it; note the hardening amendment with today's date. (5) Re-run node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply --repo-hooks --json to re-vendor the fixed hook into .bee/bin/hooks/ and re-sync installed skills; report the apply plan + recheck status; NEVER --force-downgrade; [BLOCKED] on any blocked_* status.

truths: No sentence in 0015, 0023, swarming SKILL.md, or swarming-reference.md still presents omission-only as a sufficient ceiling transport
The anchored position rule (prompt-head / description-start) appears in 0023 and in the swarming reference inherit description
After re-apply: vendored .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs is hash-identical to hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs and onboarding recheck reads up_to_date
Settings non-bee keys still byte-identical to the cell-4 snapshot .bee/workers/mtg-settings-pre.json
prohibitions: No changes to hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs or the test file (cell 5 owns them)
No new Status lines in 0015 beyond the existing one

verify: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; r=0; grep -n "omit the Agent .model. param" docs/decisions/0015-ceiling-is-the-session-model.md | grep -vq "bee-tier" && { echo 0015-OMISSION-ONLY-REMAINS; r=1; }; grep -qi "bee-tier: ceiling" docs/decisions/0015-ceiling-is-the-session-model.md || { echo 0015-NO-MARKER; r=1; }; grep -qi "first non-whitespace" docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md || { echo 0023-NO-ANCHOR-RULE; r=1; }; grep -qi "first non-whitespace" skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md || { echo REF-NO-ANCHOR-RULE; r=1; }; cmp -s hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs || { echo VENDOR-DRIFT; r=1; }; node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --json | grep -q "\"status\": \"up_to_date\"" || { echo RECHECK-NOT-CLEAN; r=1; }; node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs >/dev/null && echo LIB-OK || r=1; [ $r -eq 0 ] && echo PASS; exit $r'

trace.outcome: Fixed P1-5 and propagated the P1-1 anchored-marker contract into the durable docs: 0015 line ~19 now pairs the model-param omission with the [bee-tier: ceiling] marker; 0023's transport clause now states the anchored position rule (first non-whitespace token of prompt, or description-start) replacing the old first-500-characters scan window, plus a hardening Status note; swarming SKILL.md step 4 and swarming-reference.md (ceiling bullet, resolveTier code note, and the explicit-tier-marker paragraph) all now describe the anchored inherit/budget transport. Re-ran onboarding apply (--apply --repo-hooks, no --force-downgrade) to re-vendor .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs and re-sync installed skills; recheck is up_to_date, vendored hook is hash-identical to source, and settings.json non-bee keys are unchanged from the pre-cell-4 snapshot.
trace.verify_command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; r=0; grep -n "omit the Agent .model. param" docs/decisions/0015-ceiling-is-the-session-model.md | grep -vq "bee-tier" && { echo 0015-OMISSION-ONLY-REMAINS; r=1; }; grep -qi "bee-tier: ceiling" docs/decisions/0015-ceiling-is-the-session-model.md || { echo 0015-NO-MARKER; r=1; }; grep -qi "first non-whitespace" docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md || { echo 0023-NO-ANCHOR-RULE; r=1; }; grep -qi "first non-whitespace" skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md || { echo REF-NO-ANCHOR-RULE; r=1; }; cmp -s hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs || { echo VENDOR-DRIFT; r=1; }; node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --json | grep -q \"status\": \"up_to_date\" || { echo RECHECK-NOT-CLEAN; r=1; }; node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs >/dev/null && echo LIB-OK || r=1; [ $r -eq 0 ] && echo PASS; exit $r'
